mapper.insert: INSERT INTO biz_tag (user_id, tag_name, create_time) VALUES (#{userId}, #{tagName}, NOW())

INSERT INTO biz_tag (user_id, tag_name, create_time) VALUES
(#{tag.userId}, #{tag.tagName}, NOW())
mapper.select:
SELECT id, user_id AS userId, tag_name AS tagName, create_time AS createTime FROM biz_tag
user_id = #{userId}
AND tag_name LIKE CONCAT(#{keyword}, '%')
ORDER BY create_time DESC
